text:
Richard Hackett (リチヤード＝ハケット, Richiyādo Haketto) Hunter × Hunter Hunter Association Official Issue: Hunter's Guide; Character & World Official Databook (pg. 209) is a former Greed Island player. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 15, Chapter 151 

Appearance

Richard has short hair, a crooked nose, and thin eyebrows. He wore a white dress shirt under a vest. 

Plot

Greed Island arc

Desperate to get out of the game, he exchanges a rare card with Biscuit for a "Leave" card in front of the spell card shop in Masadora. Richard's name is mentioned later in Gon's binder. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 16, Chapter 158 

Abilities & Powers

Nen

Due to being able to access Greed Island, Richard Hackett is capable of utilizing Nen. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 13, Chapter 121 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

Though Richard Hackett's name is technically given in the manga through Gon's Greed Island binder, the correspondence between the character and his name is only provided in the Hunter's Guide databook. 

Manga and Anime Differences

Richard Hackett does not appear in the 1999 anime adaptation.
